718520a518b7c78a.name: CLI Entry & Core Utilities
718520a518b7c78a.purpose: Documents the process entry point, top-level type definitions, and shared logging utilities that every other module depends on. The central reference for how mimirs boots and what core primitives it exposes.

7f610002b13109b4.name: Wiki Pipeline — Types & Internals
7f610002b13109b4.purpose: Documents the data model, algorithms, and helper modules that power the wiki generation pipeline: type contracts, PageRank scoring, community bundling, staleness detection, page tree construction, and semantic query templates. Read this before touching any wiki generation step.
